name: Nimco Bus Div
recent_news: Listed in directories as Nimco Bus Sales & Bus Parts / scrap metals junkyard at 254 Doremus Ave, Newark NJ; not an operating school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Nimco at 254 Doremus Ave appears to be a used bus parts/sales and scrap/salvage operation, not a pupil-transport contractor. Exclude from Summit prospect list.

name: Mason & Sons Bus Svc
recent_news: No web/news footprint found. Not listed among the 24 Charles County Public Schools contractor members (Indian Head is in Charles County, MD); not located on MSBCA roster from public results.
fit_notes: Very small, single-location (5225 Red Hill Dr, Indian Head MD), 4-employee operation with no digital footprint and no apparent CCPS contract. Likely sub-scale or inactive; low priority unless ground-truth confirms it is an active independent contractor serving Charles or St. Mary's County.

name: School Link Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Minneapolis-area local and district schools (specific districts not disclosed publicly)
recent_news: Active independent operator; website lists daily pupil, athletics, field trip and SpEd services. No M&A activity found.
fit_notes: Small independent Twin Cities pupil-transport / SpEd operator with garage at 1720 Marshall St NE Minneapolis and office at 81 NE Lowry Ave. Minority/immigrant-owned profile (Hassam email) and full service mix (incl. SpEd) make it a potential micro tuck-in to densify Summit's Minnesota footprint, but very low employee count suggests <10 buses—diligence needed.

name: S & C Collins Bus Co Inc
principals: Charles A. Collins Jr. (Vice President & Director)
service_types: also affiliated Collins fuel-oil business at same site
districts_or_customers: Scituate School Department (RI) — one of three contracted busing providers
recent_news: RI corp re-registered/active (FEIN 000127476, registered 10/10/2002 as current entity; family has ~69 years of operating history per Buzzfile). Affiliate Charles A Collins Jr & Son operates alongside; family also runs Collins Burner Service (fuel oil) at same address.
fit_notes: Multi-generation Collins-family school-bus contractor in North Scituate RI; confirmed Scituate School Dept contract holder; estimated ~$2M revenue / ~10 employees. Family also runs fuel-oil business — possible succession/refocus angle. Very small (likely <15 buses) but a credible Rhode Island independent that fits Summit's family-owned tuck-in profile; complements other Northeast assets.

name: A Ace Bus Co
owner_or_parent: independent (likely affiliated with A Ace Bus Charter Inc / Rexbus LLC)
service_types: school trips (charter for schools, not home-to-school routes)
districts_or_customers: DC/MD/VA universities, religious orgs, tour groups; no contracted home-to-school routes identified
recent_news: FMCSA DOT 1341047 / MC-516798 ACTIVE, 14 power units, 20 drivers, Safety Rating Conditional (June 2026); HQ now Chantilly VA, with related Rexbus LLC (Alexandria VA) hiring drivers.
fit_notes: NOT A STRONG TUCK-IN. Primarily an interstate motorcoach/charter operator (DMV region), not a contracted yellow-school-bus pupil-transport provider; Conditional FMCSA safety rating is a yellow flag. Jessup MD address may be a depot only — primary HQ migrated to Chantilly VA. Exclude unless Summit wants charter/activity-bus capability.
